## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Product / requirements
- [ ] Design / UX
- [ ] Code
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Maintenance

## Benefit

How does this help the Ummah, the project, or future implementation?

## Ethics, Privacy, and Trust Check

- [ ] This does not expose private welfare, zakat, family, legal, financial, or security data.
- [ ] This does not weaken trust, verification, or moderation.
- [ ] This does not add hidden burden to aid seekers, small vendors, or community organizations.
- [ ] Religious, legal, tax, medical, or financial claims are avoided or routed to qualified review.
- [ ] The change is consistent with tazkiyah, adab, and public benefit.

## Testing / Review

Describe how you checked the change.
